items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Tacet Discords are increasing. Let's take them down first.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The voices are coming from here.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It might be trying to tell us something... We need to decipher the message somehow.

dialog.stepLabel: Unknown Cravings: "You should relax... Weekend... Who knows when is the next......"

items.speaker: Unknown Cravings
items.text: You should relax... Weekend... Who knows when is the next... Let's go... Come on... Go... Takeover...

items.speaker: Unknown Cravings
items.text: Tacet Discords... They won't... No... I'm gonna... I can't... Help...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It's the cheers during the Riverside Games, mingled together with cries for help.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Perhaps some people have been trapped in this place, or maybe...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Anyway, we have to figure it out.
